brand.name: Kiran Sports
brand.address: 1st Floor, LEA Complex, Civil Hospital Road, beside RLS School, Dharwad, Hubballi, Karnataka 580001

grid.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

button.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#D62828] transition-colors rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4
button.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4
button.ghost: text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase text-sm font-bold tracking-widest

product_card.wrapper: group relative flex flex-col bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#FF3B30]/50 transition-all duration-300
product_card.image: object-cover w-full h-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500
product_card.title: font-heading text-xl text-white uppercase truncate

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border-b border-white/10
navigation.links: hidden md:flex gap-8 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-300

marquee.wrapper: overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap bg-[#FF3B30] py-3 flex items-center
marquee.text: text-black font-heading text-2xl uppercase tracking-widest px-8

hero.layout: relative h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center text-center overflow-hidden
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/60 to-[#0A0A0A] z-10
hero.content: relative z-20 max-w-4xl px-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-6

featured_categories.layout: bento grid with high asymmetry. 1 large card (Cricket), 2 medium (Football, Basketball), 2 small (Tennis, Volleyball).

shop.layout: sidebar for filters (sports categories) on desktop, sticky top on mobile. Main area uses product_grid.
shop.filters: Categories: Cricket, Football, Tennis, Basketball, Volleyball,Handball,Throwball,T-shirts,Sublimation T-shirts,Costomize T-shirts,Tophies,Track pants,

about.layout: Editorial style text mixed with large typography and store location bento box.

contact.layout: Split screen: Left side Contact Form (Dark inputs, white text), Right side Google Maps embed + Address info box.

admin.layout: Strict control room grid. Sidebar navigation. Dense data tables for products.
admin.login: Minimalist centered card, deep black background, sharp borders.

images.description: Cricketer under red lighting. Use as main hero background.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='shop-now-button', data-testid='category-filter-cricket', data-testid='admin-login-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize Tailwind with #0A0A0A base background and text-white. 2. Import 'Bebas Neue' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts. 3. Build a fixed glassmorphic header. 4. Use the provided images for Hero and Category sections. 5. Create a dynamic Marquee using react-fast-marquee showing the Kannada tagline. 6. Build the Admin dashboard using a dense layout, protecting it behind a simple mock login. 7. Do not use border-radius (keep rounded-none) for a brutalist athletic feel. 8. Ensure all buttons use the heavy, uppercase font styling. 9. Setup Shadcn components but strip rounded corners to match the athletic theme.
